summary.intent: Fix a flaky OAuth E2E test where a regex locator was matching multiple elements, then merge main into the branch to incorporate upstream changes.
summary.outcome: Scoped the locator to `#providerModalTitle` to fix the ambiguous match, then resolved a merge conflict by adopting main's `waitForOAuthConnectionComplete()` helper refactor.

repo: main branch introduced a `waitForOAuthConnectionComplete()` helper in oauth.spec.js as a canonical fix for OAuth connection waiting logic
The provider modal title element is `#providerModalTitle` — use this to scope locators and avoid matching label divs with similar text

code.finding: Regex `/connected successfully|Select Model/i` matched both `#providerModalTitle` and a label div; must scope to `#providerModalTitle` to uniquely target the modal title. Main's `waitForOAuthConnectionComplete()` helper encapsulates this correctly.

workflow: When merging, prefer upstream helpers/abstractions over local fixes if they solve the same problem more cleanly
Conflict resolution at 3 sites in the same file suggests the local fix and main's refactor were parallel solutions to the same root cause

friction: Merge conflict required manually resolving 3 conflict sites in oauth.spec.js
Local fix and main's refactor were parallel solutions, meaning the local work was partially duplicated effort
